hero.title: Type-Safe Internationalization
hero.subtitle: Modern i18n for React and Next.js applications with full TypeScript support

features.title: Everything you need for modern i18n
features.subtitle: Built for performance, developer experience, and maintainability

typescript.title: Type Safety
typescript.description: Full TypeScript support with autocomplete and type checking for translation keys

performance.title: High Performance
performance.description: Optimized caching, lazy loading, and minimal runtime overhead

nextjs.title: Next.js Ready
nextjs.description: Built-in support for App Router, SSR, SSG, and middleware

developer.title: Developer Experience
developer.description: Hot reloading, CLI tools, ESLint rules, and comprehensive error handling

flexible.title: Flexible Storage
flexible.description: Cookie-based, URL-based, or custom locale storage strategies

compatibility.title: Migration Ready
compatibility.description: Drop-in replacement for next-intl with compatibility APIs

demo.title: Live Demo
demo.subtitle: Try switching languages to see the real-time updates

footer.description: A modern, type-safe internationalization library for React applications
